daily.today_energy: Your intuition is basically on god mode right now. Trust those gut feelings that keep popping up—they're trying to tell you something real. The universe is giving you permission to sit with your emotions instead of rushing through them.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language today. Share something you've been holding back. Single? Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. The energy says: be open, not closed off.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are actually genius today, even if they feel unconventional. Don't dim your light to fit the room—your perspective is exactly what's needed. Channel that dreamy energy into something tangible.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness. Whether that's stretching, a long shower, or just unplugging for a bit—honor what feels nourishing. Your nervous system is sensitive rn, so protect your peace fiercely.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of intuition this week, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings hitting different—they're basically your cosmic group chat telling you what's up. Vibe shifts incoming.
weekly.love: Your emotional frequency is magnetic rn. Whether you're coupled up or solo, lean into authenticity over performance. Real connections thrive when you stop trying to be the 'chill' version of yourself.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing but pace matters. You don't need to pitch everything immediately. Let your creative energy marinate a bit—your colleagues will notice the shift in your presence this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler rhythms. Skip the productivity grind and honor what actually refuels you—whether that's water, rest, or just existing without a to-do list. Self-care isn't lazy.
